title: [kimi-review] 767871f: [SEVERITY: low] The commit appears to be empty (no file chan
description:
Commit: 767871f2d
Message: fix(sim): unify metrics/observers in push RX path

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The commit appears to be empty (no file changes), despite a message claiming to "unify metrics/observers in push RX path." Either the diff was omitted from what was pasted here, or this is an empty commit that doesn't implement what it claims. If intentional (e.g., a placeholder), it should be squashed or amended; if the diff was lost, the actual changes need review before merge.
